launch_modes.name: single_gpu
launch_modes.entry: bash -lc "source /home/zechuan/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda run --no-capture-output -n iraod python train.py"

launch_modes.name: ddp_pytorch
launch_modes.entry: bash -lc "source /home/zechuan/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3,4 conda run --no-capture-output -n iraod python -m torch.distributed.launch --nproc_per_node=5 train.py --launcher pytorch"
launch_modes.notes: train.py/test.py support --launcher pytorch via mmcv.init_dist. Repo convention uses 5 GPUs.

baseline_anchor.notes: All method changes must beat this anchor under fixed test-time NMS IoU=0.30.

hypotheses.summary: Replacing the RoI classification loss with CE-Focal reduces class imbalance / hard-negative dominance and improves RSAR test mAP at fixed schedule.
hypotheses.rationale: RSAR contains small/dense objects and background clutter. A focal-style reweighting can reduce overconfidence on easy negatives and focus learning on hard examples without changing the training recipe (epochs/LR/NMS). The repo already provides a registered CE-style focal loss (mmdet_extension.models.loss.CEFocalLoss), enabling a clean one-axis test.

hypotheses.summary: Upgrading the neck from vanilla FPN to PAFPN improves multi-scale fusion for small/elongated rotated targets, improving RSAR test mAP.
hypotheses.rationale: FPN is top-down only. PAFPN adds bottom-up path aggregation, often improving localization and recall for small objects and crowded scenes—both common in remote-sensing imagery. This is a method-level architectural change (feature fusion) and is a single-axis swap with the rest of Oriented R-CNN unchanged. A single-run result slightly underperformed the anchor; treat as likely null until multi-seed repro.

hypotheses.summary: Replacing ResNet-50 with the repo-provided OrthoNet-50 (orthogonal channel attention) improves SAR texture feature extraction and raises RSAR test mAP.
hypotheses.rationale: SAR textures are sensitive to speckle-like patterns and directional structure. OrthoNet introduces an orthogonal channel attention mechanism that could better model such textures than standard ResNet, while keeping the detector scaffold (RPN/ROI heads) unchanged. This is higher risk because no pretrained checkpoint is currently tracked in-repo, but it expands the frontier with a backbone-level method contribution.

hypotheses.summary: OrthoNet-50 with explicit ResNet-50 pretrained initialization (plus Ortho attention) improves RSAR test mAP under the fixed 24-epoch anchor recipe.
hypotheses.rationale: A prior OrthoNet proposal was rejected due to unclear/fair initialization vs the pretrained ResNet-50 anchor. By explicitly initializing OrthoNet from torchvision ResNet-50 weights (non-matching attention weights left random), we reduce the pretraining confound and can attribute any gain to the orthogonal channel attention mechanism.

hypotheses.summary: Replacing SmoothL1 with an IoU-aware rotated bbox regression loss (e.g., GDLoss/KLDLoss) improves oriented localization and RSAR test mAP at fixed recipe.
hypotheses.rationale: SmoothL1 optimizes parameter-space deltas and can be misaligned with rotated IoU geometry. IoU-aware distribution/geometry losses (GWD/KLD-style) can better capture orientation/scale coupling, potentially improving final box quality without changing the training schedule or NMS.

hypotheses.summary: Replacing RPN MaxIoUAssigner with ATSSAssigner improves positive/negative assignment in dense SAR scenes and increases RSAR test mAP under the fixed 24-epoch anchor recipe.
hypotheses.rationale: The baseline uses fixed IoU thresholds for RPN assignment, which can be brittle for small/elongated objects and crowded remote-sensing layouts. ATSS is a method-level label assignment algorithm that adaptively selects positives per-level, often improving recall without changing LR/epochs/NMS.

hypotheses.summary: Adding lightweight orthogonal channel attention to the FPN neck (OCA-FPN) improves multi-scale feature selection for SAR textures and increases RSAR test mAP under the fixed 24-epoch anchor recipe.
hypotheses.rationale: We already have a repo-implemented OrthoChannelAttention (used in OrthoNet). Applying a similar attention block on FPN outputs is a small architectural change focused on feature reweighting, potentially boosting small-object signal without touching the optimizer schedule or NMS.

experiment_specs.summary: RSAR 24ep OrientedRCNN-R50-FPN: switch RoI cls loss from CrossEntropyLoss → CEFocalLoss (mmdet_extension).
experiment_specs.change_plan: Single axis: in roi_head.bbox_head.loss_cls, set type=CEFocalLoss (use_sigmoid=False, gamma=2.0). Ensure mmdet_extension is imported via custom_imports so the loss is registered. Keep all schedule/optimizer/NMS unchanged.
experiment_specs.evaluation_plan: Train with the 24-epoch anchor schedule (step=[16,22]). Evaluate RSAR test mAP with fixed NMS IoU=0.30 as specified in .research/evaluation.md. Success: mAP > 0.701; report delta vs anchor.
experiment_specs.attribution_focus: Isolate the effect of focal reweighting for RoI classification on the fixed two-stage rotated detector.
experiment_specs.expected_signal: Small but consistent mAP gain (≈ +0.3 to +1.0) driven by improved precision/recall on hard classes/scenes.

experiment_specs.summary: RSAR 24ep OrientedRCNN-R50: switch neck from FPN → PAFPN (same channels/outs).
experiment_specs.change_plan: Single axis: replace model.neck from type=FPN to type=PAFPN using in_channels=[256,512,1024,2048], out_channels=256, num_outs=5. Keep backbone/head/train_cfg/test_cfg identical to anchor.
experiment_specs.evaluation_plan: Train with the 24-epoch anchor schedule (step=[16,22]). Evaluate RSAR test mAP with fixed NMS IoU=0.30 as specified in .research/evaluation.md. Success: mAP > 0.701; otherwise archive.
experiment_specs.attribution_focus: Isolate the impact of bottom-up path aggregation in the feature pyramid for rotated two-stage detection.
experiment_specs.expected_signal: Moderate mAP gain (≈ +0.5 to +1.5) if improved multi-scale fusion increases recall for small objects.

experiment_specs.summary: RSAR 24ep OrientedRCNN: switch backbone from ResNet-50 → OrthoNet-50 (repo module).
experiment_specs.change_plan: Single axis: replace model.backbone.type from ResNet to OrthoNet (depth=50, out_indices=(0,1,2,3), frozen_stages=1, norm_eval=True). Add custom_imports to import mmdet_extension.models.backbones so OrthoNet is registered. Keep neck/head/schedule/optimizer fixed.
experiment_specs.evaluation_plan: Train with the 24-epoch anchor schedule (step=[16,22]). Evaluate RSAR test mAP with fixed NMS IoU=0.30 as specified in .research/evaluation.md. Success: mAP > 0.701; if training is unstable or underperforms significantly, mark as rejected and do not iterate without a pretrained initialization plan.
experiment_specs.attribution_focus: Isolate the effect of orthogonal channel attention in the backbone on RSAR detection.
experiment_specs.expected_signal: If the backbone better models SAR textures, expect improved localization/classification and a measurable mAP gain; otherwise likely underperforms due to lack of pretrained initialization.

experiment_specs.summary: RSAR 24ep OrientedRCNN: backbone swap ResNet50→OrthoNet50 with explicit ResNet50 pretrained init (strict=False) for fair attribution.
experiment_specs.change_plan: Single axis: replace model.backbone.type ResNet→OrthoNet (depth=50, out_indices=(0,1,2,3), frozen_stages=1, norm_eval=True). Ensure OrthoNet is registered (import mmdet_extension.models.backbones). Add/patch initialization so OrthoNet loads torchvision ResNet50 weights with strict=False (matching conv/bn/stage weights), leaving attention parameters randomly initialized. Keep neck/head/optimizer/schedule/test_cfg identical to anchor.
experiment_specs.evaluation_plan: Train with the 24-epoch anchor schedule (step=[16,22]). Evaluate RSAR test mAP with fixed NMS IoU=0.30 per .research/evaluation.md. Success: mAP > 0.701; also report delta vs anchor.
experiment_specs.attribution_focus: Isolate backbone architectural change (orthogonal channel attention) under a fair pretrained initialization.
experiment_specs.expected_signal: If Ortho attention helps SAR textures, expect measurable mAP gain (≈ +0.3 to +1.5). If no gain, performance should match anchor within noise given similar initialization.

experiment_specs.summary: RSAR 24ep OrientedRCNN-R50-FPN: switch RoI bbox regression loss SmoothL1→IoU-aware rotated loss (GDLoss(gwd) or KLDLoss) with everything else fixed.
experiment_specs.change_plan: Single axis: in roi_head.bbox_head.loss_bbox, replace SmoothL1Loss with an IoU-aware rotated bbox loss supported by mmrotate (prefer GDLoss with loss_type="gwd" and a conservative weight like 5.0, or KLDLoss if available). Keep bbox_coder, cls loss, backbone/neck, optimizer, schedule, and test_cfg unchanged.
experiment_specs.evaluation_plan: Train with the 24-epoch anchor schedule (step=[16,22]). Evaluate RSAR test mAP with fixed NMS IoU=0.30 per .research/evaluation.md. Success: mAP > 0.701; report delta vs anchor.
experiment_specs.attribution_focus: Isolate the effect of an IoU-aware rotated bbox regression objective in the RoI head.
experiment_specs.expected_signal: Potential gain in localization quality and AP (≈ +0.2 to +1.0) if regression aligns better with rotated IoU; risk of degradation if loss is unstable.

experiment_specs.summary: RSAR 24ep OrientedRCNN-R50-FPN: switch RPN assigner from MaxIoUAssigner -> ATSSAssigner (topk=9), keep everything else fixed.
experiment_specs.change_plan: Single axis: in model.train_cfg.rpn.assigner, replace type=MaxIoUAssigner(...) with type=ATSSAssigner(topk=9). Do not change LR/epochs/weight_decay/NMS, and keep the RPN head/anchors/samplers unchanged.
experiment_specs.evaluation_plan: Train with the 24-epoch anchor schedule (configs/experiments/rsar/frontier_008_24ep_oriented_rcnn_rsar.py as base). Evaluate RSAR test mAP with fixed NMS IoU=0.30 per .research/evaluation.md. Success: mAP > 0.701; otherwise record delta and archive.
experiment_specs.attribution_focus: Isolate the effect of adaptive training-time label assignment in RPN on the final two-stage rotated detector.
experiment_specs.expected_signal: If assignment improves recall/quality of proposals, expect a small but measurable mAP gain (≈ +0.2 to +1.0).

experiment_specs.summary: RSAR 24ep OrientedRCNN-R50: replace neck FPN -> OCA-FPN (FPN + OrthoChannelAttention on each output level), keep everything else fixed.
experiment_specs.change_plan: Single axis: introduce a new neck module OCAFPN that wraps standard FPN and applies OrthoChannelAttention (reduction=16) to each of the 5 output feature maps. Register it under mmdet NECKS (e.g., mmdet_extension/models/necks/oca_fpn.py + mmdet_extension/models/__init__.py). In the experiment config, replace model.neck.type from FPN to OCAFPN with identical in_channels/out_channels/num_outs. Keep backbone/head/train_cfg/test_cfg/optimizer/schedule/NMS unchanged.
experiment_specs.evaluation_plan: Train with the 24-epoch anchor schedule (frontier_008_24ep_oriented_rcnn_rsar.py as base). Evaluate RSAR test mAP with fixed NMS IoU=0.30 per .research/evaluation.md. Success: mAP > 0.701; otherwise archive as negative.
experiment_specs.attribution_focus: Isolate attention-based feature reweighting in the multi-scale neck (no backbone/head changes).
experiment_specs.expected_signal: If attention suppresses clutter and boosts small-object features, expect modest mAP gain (≈ +0.3 to +1.2).

evidence.description: 24-epoch schedule with NMS IoU=0.30 on RSAR test split. Best val epoch=21.
RSAR test mAP with fixed NMS IoU=0.30 for FPN→PAFPN neck swap (single run). Slightly below anchor (0.701).
RSAR test mAP with fixed NMS IoU=0.30 for RoI cls loss swap CE→CEFocalLoss (single run). Large regression vs anchor (0.701).

claim_updates.reason: Single-axis neck swap did not beat the fixed-NMS anchor; observed test mAP is marginally lower (Δ≈-0.00047), consistent with no improvement (possible run-to-run noise).
Observed RSAR test mAP 0.6212 is far below the fixed-NMS anchor 0.701 (Δ≈-0.0798) for a single-axis loss swap, contradicting the hypothesis under this setting.

frontier.description: Anchor: 24ep OrientedRCNN-R50-FPN, step=[16,22], NMS IoU=0.30, test mAP=0.701
Method: replace neck FPN→PAFPN under the 24ep anchor schedule; eval RSAR test mAP with NMS IoU=0.30.
frontier.review_reason: Post-run: PAFPN neck swap produced mAP 0.7005 vs anchor 0.701 at fixed NMS IoU=0.30 (single run). No measurable gain; archive as weak negative evidence.

frontier.description: Method: switch RoI cls loss CE→CE-Focal (CEFocalLoss) with everything else fixed; eval RSAR test mAP @ NMS=0.30.
frontier.review_reason: Post-run: CE→CEFocalLoss RoI cls swap regressed to test mAP 0.6212 vs anchor 0.701 at fixed NMS IoU=0.30 (Δ≈-0.0798). Reject this hypothesis/spec setting.

frontier.description: Breadth: replace backbone ResNet50→OrthoNet50 (orthogonal channel attention); keep detector+schedule fixed; eval RSAR test mAP @ NMS=0.30.
frontier.review_reason: Backbone swap is confounded by initialization/pretraining: the anchor ResNet50 typically uses pretrained weights, but no comparable pretrained OrthoNet checkpoint/plan is specified, weakening causal attribution.

frontier.description: Method: switch RoI bbox regression SmoothL1→IoU-aware rotated loss (GDLoss/KLDLoss); keep 24ep anchor recipe; eval RSAR test mAP @ NMS=0.30.
frontier.review_reason: Preflight reject: change_plan is underspecified (allows multiple different losses: GDLoss or KLDLoss, plus tunable weights). Pin one exact loss type + fixed parameters to test a single causal claim under the evaluation contract.

frontier.description: Breadth: backbone ResNet50→OrthoNet50 with explicit ResNet50 pretrained init for fair attribution; keep 24ep anchor recipe; eval RSAR test mAP @ NMS=0.30.
frontier.review_reason: Preflight approve: single causal target is OrthoNet attention under fair pretrained init (ResNet50 weights, strict=False). Evaluation contract is concrete (RSAR test mAP @ IoU=0.5, fixed NMS IoU=0.30) and attribution confound from missing pretraining is addressed.

frontier.description: Method: replace RPN label assignment MaxIoUAssigner -> ATSSAssigner (topk=9) under fixed 24ep anchor recipe; eval RSAR test mAP @ NMS=0.30.
Method: neck FPN -> OCA-FPN (FPN + OrthoChannelAttention on each output level) under fixed 24ep anchor recipe; eval RSAR test mAP @ NMS=0.30.
